description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 19, 2025 at 5:08 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Brisbane, California was in a collision 
involving a hand truck dolly on Valley Drive near Bayshore Boulevard.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northeastbound on Valley Drive in the right lane behind a heavy truck with its trailer door open. While the 
Waymo AV and the heavy truck were continuing northeastbound, a hand truck dolly fell from the back of the heavy truck trailer onto the 
roadway in the Waymo AV’s lane of travel, and the undercarriage of the Waymo AV made contact with the hand truck dolly. At the time of 
the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
